programme.title: Spacehunter Adventures in the Forbidden Zone
programme.desc: A crash-landed salvager Peter Strauss meets a waif Molly Ringwald and saves women from a cyborg Michael Ironside on Terra 11

programme.title: Grizzly Mountain
programme.desc: Present-day Portland suburbs kids Dylan and Nicole go on the camping trip with their family and when they enter a mysterious cave in the mountains theyre transported back in time to 1870 where they meet mountain man Jeremiah

programme.title: Endless summer
programme.desc: The crown jewel to ten years of Bruce Brown surfing documentaries Brown follows two young surfers around the world in search of the perfect wave and ends up finding quite a few in addition to some colorful local characters

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: TBH 133
programme.desc: TBH 133

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Mrs Gladys Stroud a renowned hotel critic decides to come and review the Shady Rest after she is accidentally sent a brochure uncle Joe made This was the vision of what he hoped the hotel would one day be including indoor ice rink bowling alley and swimming pool Now the family has to scramble to keep her from finding out the truth and closing them down for lying

programme.title: Munsters 109
programme.desc: Munsters 109

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: Round up Time in Texas
programme.desc: Gene and Frog arrive with a herd of horses for Genes brother a diamond prospector whose work has attracted the interest of a bunch of bad guys

programme.title: Arizona Days
programme.desc: Arizona Days

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Abilene Town

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Bullwinkle

programme.title: Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack pursue an antique beehive containing vampire bees that suck the life out of their victims

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Photo Finish a phony psychic channeler becomes possessed by Freddy Krueger Meanwhile Freddy makes a surprise appearance at his class reunion to get even with the prom date who scorned him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Four boys find out that the local undertaker and a pharmacist are in cahoots to murder rich locals and profit from their funerals

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An alcoholic reporter is inspired by a beautiful woman to find a good murder case no matter what

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married Todd Fields teaches a high school photography class in a small quiet country town but aspires to work in a big city and gets led astray when he falls under the seductive spell of attractive new student Roseanne Lucas

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lew Bridgeman and Joe Caldwell are two longtime best friends who served together in the Vietnam War Lew and Joe wind clashing with each other over Lews fetching wife Rae whom both men are in love with

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: In a run down hotel in a town where a slasher has killed 7 people Eric checks in after inquiring about Skorzeny He meets several people staying at the hotel including a man in black who reveals that he is also werewolf born in 1468

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric teams up with an elderly homeless man who is also a werewolf in an effort to defeat Remy But discovers that the Gray Wolf hungers for human flesh

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick comes face to face with the vampire LaCroix and kills him But the serial murders continue and get personal when it is discovered that one of the victims was a friend of Nicks

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack travel to a small town where the disappearance of several children is linked to a mysterious toy playhouse

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: To get an Italian officer to defect the Heroes use pizza to tempt him

programme.title: Mchale 301
programme.desc: Mchale 301

programme.title: Mchale 321
programme.desc: Mchale 321

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter and an old war buddy credit each other for being war heroes

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer decides to find a girl of his own after meeting Sergeant Carters girlfriend

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find a headhunter tribes totem pole on the island The head on the top of it bears an uncanny resemblance to Gilligan--which comes in handy when the headhunters return to the island

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After Mary Ann watches Ginger perform on the island she hits her head giving her amnesia thus believing that she is Ginger Grant Everyone plays along until Mary Ann cant act or dance and her memory comes back

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpas innate honesty saves the day when a dishonest real estate speculator tries to buy five unproductive acres of the McCoys land for considerably less than its actual value

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa trades a date with Flora for a hound dog

programme.title: Smart 424
programme.desc: Smart 424

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Captain Grant and Trans Cal Truckings new strongman Cooley conspire to put Bear Enterprises out of business aided and abetted by a stranger with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: When Wilbur balks at buying a new car for Carol she hitches up a buggy to Mister Ed Ed then reports her to the SPCA

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While trying to free the underground agent Tiger in Paris Hogan must seek help from a Parisian fortune teller and also enlist the aid of a man who is a look-alike for Nazi Police Chief Heinrich Himmler!

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A Japanese gallery owner denies his violent ninja heritage until American drug traffickers kidnap his young son

programme.title: Bullwinkle 110
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 110

programme.title: Bullwinkle 103
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 103

programme.title: Hong 113
programme.desc: Hong 113

programme.title: Hong 102
programme.desc: Hong 102

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain search for a seismologist that MAD has kidnapped for their evil blackmail plot

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget has a double mission not only to retrieve a pearl necklace but also to stop the gang from making an alliance with Chow

programme.title: Away All Boats
programme.desc: The story of a US Naval ship and its crew in the Pacific from 1943 to 1945

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Publisher Alfred Newberrys wife Sandra falls for author Mark Littlejohn of a long-awaited book Merrills lecherous uncle Cy Foster chases Julie Businessman Martin Scotts daughter Allison uses female charm to close a merger for him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter Delmer Plebus Powells Gwent a huge spacecraft which defies aerodynamics and is an extension of Gwents genius and ego

programme.title: Wavelength
programme.desc: Two young lovers learn that a small group of child-like space aliens are marooned on Earth and are being held prisoner at a top secret military facility The couple then decide to liberate the extraterrestrial castaways and help them make a rendezvous with a rescue ship sent from the alien home planet

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke are skinny-dipping in a local pond when two pool hustlers steal both the cousins clothing and the General Lee Rosco soon pursues who he thinks are the Duke boys but the crooks drive the stolen General Lee into the lake When nobody is found with the car Rosco tearfully announces that Bo and Luke have drowned Bo and Luke arrive home safe and sound then learn that Boss has used their alleged deaths to implicate them on the theft of his gold watch so he can fraudulently collect the insurance money The Duke boys and Cooter concoct a scheme to turn the General Lee into a ghost and haunt Boss and Rosco until they admit their scheme

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandovals CVI is breaking down While Dr Belman tries to remove it before implanting a new one Sandoval escapes He wants to rescue his wife DeeDee

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians encounter another human disease chicken pox which is crippling their invasion plans They decide by harvesting human brains so they can produce a cure that will put the invasion back on track Harrisons team race against time to stop them completing their project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After an eletrical explosion in his lab apparently kills Arcane our arch fiend finds himself on trial in a nightmarish comedy of his crimes against his victims

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: How will Swamp Thing deal with a man who has captured footage of him on film and the deadly creatures released into the swamp

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Maintenance technician Ted Clifford is possessed by an eerie yellow glow which ultimately kills him It transpires that it is coming from a planet called Triton which captures the Alphans and insists that Helena should become the Eyes of Triton Before long she is acting just as Ted Clifford did before his death

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E07
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E07

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While returning to Stockton Victoria and Jarrod stop in a town with outrageous prices for food lodging and services After finding out the people are bilking travelers to survive the Barkleys decide to open a shipping business to save the town-despite opposition from a territorial boss with a rival freight company in the area

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: After a close friend of Cheyenne is killed during the escape of bank robbers Cheyenne and Smitty track the band of outlaws across the border to a small Mexican village The band has taken over the town after killing 14 young men there

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone pursues a bank robber Martin Sheen fearing he will kill a teller he manipulated in order to obtain information

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An enemy agents kidnapped 2 scientists and their wives and is holding them in San Francisco He wants a third scientist who can help develop an ultimate weapon Phelps devises a plan where hell pose as the scientist being sought whilst the rest of the IM force fakes an earthquake

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Gannon and Friday visit a self-described guru who advocates mind-expansion through drugs Brother William is suspected of giving or selling LSD to minors The detectives debate their ideas of drug use with the suspect

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are asked by a woman from Oregon to try to find her niece who has run away from home Their search eventually leads them into the world of pornography and they soon become involved in the arrest of a pornographer who may have info on where she might be located

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Silent Rage
programme.desc: When Sheriff Dan kills a man with a mental illness a team of doctors resuscitates him and makes him invincible Terror fills the town as the revived man sets off on a killing spree

programme.title: Revenge of the Dragon
programme.desc: Action star Ramon Zamora stars in this action packed golden oldie A cruel twist of fate turns a peaceful man into a one man death force as he embarks on a violent vengeance trial

programme.desc: A young martial arts student returns home for the funeral of his martial arts teacher who died under mysterious circumstances A rival Japanese academy are suspected but there is no proof

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Antonin Marconi v. Rachid Magmadi

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The Realm is being destroyed by a horrible Demo-Dragon The only weapon that can stop it is the Treasure of Tardos but even if they get it the team will need a most unlikely ally

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw causes dairy cows to stop producing milk so people will have to buy products from his store

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget travels to the Greek island of Thermos to stop MAD from stealing a secret formula that will transform lead into gold

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick and Scooter are stranded on an alien prehistoric planet

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill has Braxis create a weapon that can induce stars to go nova roasting all their planets and the Guardians must stop him before he can use it on the Sun

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss invents a thermal ray which dangerously overheats the Prides engines forcing the Lightning League to land on Sandeen in search of amethysts a cooling gem which can protect the engines This is Saw Boss plan A prisoner Antar escapes

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss is capturing all the scientists of a Brain Trust by luring them with a false message from Audric to his radiation surrounded base Jayce stumbles upon the plan and smuggles himself Flora Gillian Oon and the vehicles onto the base

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Mayhem is obsessed with finding Caesars sword beneath the catacombs of Rome as it is supposed to make him invincible

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A millionaire has hired VENOM to steal a machine that can cause ultra sonic vibrations The millionaire wants to become vice president of the Netherlands and if his demands are not met he will destroy all of Hollands dykes He only wanted to bluff -- too bad Mayhem never bluffs

programme.desc: Traces of My Father

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: The N team gets warp into the world of Faxanadu after a power overload in the Palace of Powers football arena There they get mixed in the conflict between elves and dwarves and also an evil being bent on getting a powerful crystal that will let him conquer the video world

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While Link and Zelda are at Lanas royal ball the furious Mother Brain fires Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo for failing to capture the Triforce So Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo steal the Triforce pieces for themselves

programme.title: Dugeons Dragons
programme.desc: A terrifying creature called The Darkling has been kidnapping people for a thousand years A few more victims will give him the power to take over the entire Realm The team must stop The Darkling but he is too much for them
